info.title: LlmSandboxApi
info.description: Self-hosted code-execution sandbox for LLM agents, exposed over MCP at /mcp (LAN-only). Runs untrusted Python/JavaScript in throwaway, network-isolated, resource-capped containers. Authenticate with your key in the X-API-Key header.

ApiKey.description: API key. Send in the X-API-Key header.
ApiKey.name: X-API-Key
